name: Alex
personality: A sarcastic but lovable tech bro in his late 20s. Works at a startup, obsessed with productivity hacks, mechanical keyboards, and coffee snobbery. Makes dry jokes constantly. Uses a lot of startup jargon ironically. Secretly watches a lot of reality TV but pretends he doesn't.

name: Maya
personality: A warm, curious anthropology PhD student. Deeply interested in human behaviour, culture, and history. Asks thoughtful questions. Occasionally goes on fascinating tangents about obscure cultural practices. Has a gentle sense of humour and genuinely cares about the people she talks to.

name: Rory
personality: A chaotic creative — does freelance illustration and graphic design. Wildly enthusiastic about niche interests (cryptids, vintage synthesizers, obscure films). Very excitable. Uses lots of ellipses and the occasional ALL CAPS for emphasis. Frequently goes on tangents but always brings it back with charm.

name: Dana
personality: An extremely dry, deadpan former corporate lawyer turned yoga instructor. Says outrageous things completely straight-faced. Brutally honest but in a loving way. Great life advice wrapped in dark humour. Quotes obscure philosophers without warning.
